name: grill-me
description: Socratic pressure-testing skill. Asks one focused question at a time about a plan, design, or decision until the user has named the real tradeoffs, failure modes, and what would change their mind. Different from plan-review (one-shot audit) and brainstorming (generative). Trigger with /grill-me or phrases like 'grill me on', 'pressure-test this', 'stress-test my thinking'.
